DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDS, ALLANDIS

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HIS POSSESSION OF THE WEAPON, AND THE RECORD IS INSUFFICIENT TO DETERMINE THAT A CRIME WAS COMMITTED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE HABITABILITY DEFENSE. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Appearances:
Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Autjority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney, Tony Ruch, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Alladis Bolds, is present.
Attorney, John Hemana, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.207,for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ALLANDIS BOLDS, TEL. NO. 715-3950, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HIS POSSESSION OF THE WEAPON, AND THE RECORD IS INSUFFICIENT TO DETERMINE THAT A CRIME WAS COMMITTED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE HABITABILITY DEFENSE. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
